title: NoRefreshScroll
description: Stops the server list scrolling when clicking the "Refresh" button in the Multiplayer menu.
body:
Very simply a mod that stops the Multiplayer screen from scrolling to the top of the server list when using the refresh page.

I regularly have to test server connections using my Minecraft client, so when I add something and have to refresh multiple times, it's fairly irritating and this was pretty much my solution to it.
